# NETSTAT(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  netstat — print network connections and listening ports

## SYNOPSIS
  netstat [-tulpn]

## DESCRIPTION
Shows open network connections and listening services.
Alias for `ss` in this environment.

## OPTIONS
  -t  TCP connections
  -u  UDP connections
  -l  listening ports only
  -p  show process
  -n  numeric addresses

## EXAMPLES
  netstat -tulpn
  ss -tulpn
  netstat | grep 8443

## SEE ALSO
  ss, nmap, ping, nc
